Building configuration...

Current configuration : 352 bytes
!
interface TwentyFiveGigE2/1/2
 description Trunk_to_FortiGate_100F
 switchport trunk allowed vlan 10,11,30,40,50,60,100
 switchport mode trunk
 device-tracking attach-policy MERAKI_NO_TRACK
 ip flow monitor MERAKI_TA1_NO_AVC_V4_IN input

 ip dhcp relay information trusted
 ip dhcp snooping trust
end
